creator: redrat@mail.ru
text:
There is a little typo in the code of bin/mrtg in the line #1744: ordinary quotation marks instead of double quotation marks. This breaks translations for some languages (e.g. Russian). So, this line:

".&$LOC("$sample{$peri}").&$LOC(' Average)')."

should be like:

".&$LOC("$sample{$peri}").&$LOC(" Average)")."

Fix: Attached patch fixes this problem. Patch attached with submission follows: How-To-Repeat: Install MRTG, change language to Russian and look at translation.
